name: gchat-slackify
description: Make Google Chat look and feel like Slack. Cosmetic, lightweight, and private — no data leaves your browser.

scripts.check: node --check src/config.js && node --check src/themes.js && node --check src/styles.js && node --check src/apply.js && node --check src/tagger.js && node --check src/controls.js && node --check popup/popup.js
scripts.lint: eslint src popup tools test eslint.config.js
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix src popup tools test eslint.config.js
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run validate && npm test
scripts.package: rm -f slackify-for-google-chat.zip && zip -rq slackify-for-google-chat.zip manifest.json src popup icons fonts -x '*.DS_Store' && echo 'built slackify-for-google-chat.zip (upload this to the Chrome Web Store)'
